sections.paragraph:
Original: כּוּר

Transliteration: kûr

Phonetic: koor

BDB Definition:

  1. furnace, forge, smelting furnace or pot (noun masculine)
  2. (Qal) to bore, pierce, dig, hew (verb)

Origin: from an unused root meaning properly, to dig through

TWOT entry: 967b,968

Part(s) of speech:
